subcodes.title: Words spoken to Baha'is of Stuttgart, Hotel Marquardt, 1913-04-27
subcodes.first_line: I beseech for you divine confirmation and imperishable glory, so that ye may be so strengthened by His grace as to become wholly detached
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از برای شما تأییدات الهیه و عزت ابدیه میخواهم که چنان مؤید گردید که از جمیع شئون عالم طبیعت فارغ
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
